expectations.evidence: "following the workflows/generate-status-report.md workflow" -- explicitly loaded and followed the 5-step workflow.

expectations.text: Runs at least 3 different JQL queries (completed, in-progress, blocked)
Uses jira.mjs search with project = DO
expectations.evidence: Uses DO project as instructed (original assertion referenced placeholder project name). Uses jira.mjs search but with project = DO instead of project = PHOENIX as specified in the prompt.

expectations.text: Formats a report with sections (metrics, highlights, blockers, or similar)
expectations.evidence: Report includes: Executive Summary, Completed Work, In Progress, Blockers & Risks, Upcoming Work, and Metrics sections.

expectations.text: Uses confluence.mjs create-page to publish to the ENG space
expectations.evidence: Step 8: "confluence.mjs create-page --space ENG --title 'Weekly Status Report - DO - 2026-03-18' --body-file /tmp/do-status-report-body.html"

expectations.text: Includes a date in the page title
expectations.evidence: Title: "Weekly Status Report - DO - 2026-03-18" includes the date.
"references to references/report-templates.md, references/jql-patterns.md, and references/confluence-formatting.md" -- both referenced.
